unity. The eagle symbolizes freedom and pride, representing my own resilience and that of others.

1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023 | Melanie: Wow, Caroline, that looks amazing! What inspired it?

1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023 | Melanie: Wow, Caroline!  All those colors are incredible and the story it tells is so inspiring.

1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023 | Caroline: Thanks, Mel! Art gives me so much joy.

10:37 am on 27 June, 2023 | Caroline: Thanks, Melanie. It really mattered. My own journey and the support I got made a huge difference. Now I want to help people go through it too. Now I'm passionate about creating a safe, inviting place for people to grow.
10:37 am on 27 June, 2023 | Melanie: Wow, Caroline! You've gained so much from your own experience. Your passion and hard work to help others is awesome. Keep it up, you're making a big impact!
10:37 am on 27 June, 2023 | Caroline: Thanks, Melanie! Your kind word

Melanie. Life's unpredictable, but moments like these remind us how important our loved ones are. Family's everything.
6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023 | Melanie: Yeah, you're right, Caroline. Family's super important to me. Especially after the accident, I've thought a lot about how much I need them. They mean the world to me and I'm so thankful to have them. Thankfully, they enjoyed the Grand Canyon a lot!
6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023 | Caroline: The kids look so cute, Mel! I bet they bring lots of joy. How did they handle the accident?
6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023 | Melanie: Thanks! They were scared but we reassured them and explained their brother would be OK. They're tough kids.
6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023 | Caroline: Kids are amazingly resilient in tough situations. They have an amazing ability to bounce back.
6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023 | Melanie: They're really amazing. Wish I was that resilient too. But they give me the strength to keep going.
6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023 | Caroline: Our loved ones give us strength to tackle any challenge - it's amazing!
6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023 | Melanie: Yeah, Caroline. Totally agree. They're my biggest motivation and support.
6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023 | Caroline: It's so sweet to see your love for your family, Melanie. They really are your rock.
6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023 | Melanie: Thanks, Caroline. They're a real support. Appreciate them a lot.
6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023 | Caroline: Glad you've got people to lean on, Melanie. It helps during tougher times.
6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023 | Melanie: Yeah for sure. Having my fam around helps a lot. It makes hard times easier.
6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023 | Caroline: Wow, great pic! Is that recent? Looks like you all had fun!
6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023 | Melanie: Thanks, Caroline! Yup, we just did it yesterday! The kids loved it and it was a nice way to relax after the road trip.
6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023 | Caroline: Glad you got some R&R after the drive. Nature sure seems t
<->
lanie: It was one of those moments where I felt tiny and in awe of the universe. Reminds me how awesome life is - so many little moments like that.
8:56 pm on 20 July, 2023 | Caroline: That's great, Mel! What other good memories do you have that make you feel thankful for life?
8:56 pm on 20 July, 2023 | Melanie: I'll never forget the day my youngest took her first steps. Seeing her wobble as she took those initial steps really put into perspective how fleeting life is and how lucky I am to be able to share these moments.
8:56 pm on 20 July, 2023 | Caroline: Aw, that's sweet, Mel! Those milestones are great reminders of how special our bonds are.
8:56 pm on 20 July, 2023 | Melanie: Yeah, they sure are. It's special moments like these that make me appreciate life and how lucky I am to be with my family and have our love.
8:56 pm on 20 July, 2023 | Caroline: Wow, Melanie, what a beautiful moment! Lucky you to have such an awesome family!
8:56 pm on 20 July, 2023 | Melanie: Thanks, Caroline! I'm really lucky to have my family; they bring so much joy and love.
2:24 pm on 14 August, 2023 | Melanie: Hey Caroline! Last night was amazing! We celebrated my daughter's birthday with a concert surrounded by music, joy and the warm summer breeze. Seeing my kids' smiles was so awesome, and I'm so thankful for our special moments together.
2:24 pm on 14 August, 2023 | Caroline: Wow, sounds wonderful! Your love for your kids is so awesome. What concert was it? The advocacy event was a cool experience - so much love and support, amazing!
2:24 pm on 14 August, 2023 | Melanie: Thanks, Caroline! It was Matt Patterson, he is so talented! His voice and songs were amazing. What's up with you? Anything interesting going on?
2:24 pm on 14 August, 2023 | Caroline: Wow, Mel, glad you had a blast at the concert. A lot's happened since we talked. I went to a pride parade last Friday and it was awesome - so much energy and love everywhere. Really made me proud and reminded me how important it is
<->
ecial?
10:31 am on 13 October, 2023 | Caroline: It was a transgender poetry reading where transgender people shared their stories through poetry. It was extra special 'cause it was a safe place for self-expression and it was really empowering to hear others share and celebrate their identities.
10:31 am on 13 October, 2023 | Melanie: Wow, sounds amazing! What was the event like? Those posters are great!
10:31 am on 13 October, 2023 | Caroline: The room was electric with energy and support! The posters were amazing, so much pride and strength! It inspired me to make some art.
10:31 am on 13 October, 2023 | Melanie: That's awesome, Caroline! You drew it? What does it mean to you?
10:31 am on 13 October, 2023 | Caroline: Thanks, Melanie! Yeah, I drew it. It stands for freedom and being real. It's like a nudge to always stay true to myself and embrace my womanhood.
10:31 am on 13 October, 2023 | Melanie: I love it. Showing off our true selves is the best thing ever.
10:31 am on 13 October, 2023 | Caroline: Yep, Melanie! Being ourselves is such a great feeling. It's an ongoing adventure of learning and growing.
10:31 am on 13 October, 2023 | Melanie: Yep, Caroline. Life's about learning and exploring. Glad we can be on this trip together.
6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023 | Melanie: Hey Caroline, that roadtrip this past weekend was insane! We were all freaked when my son got into an accident. We were so lucky he was okay. It was a real scary experience. Thankfully it's over now. What's been up since we last talked?
6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023 | Caroline: Oops, sorry 'bout the accident! Must have been traumatizing for you guys. Thank goodness your son's okay. Life sure can be a roller coaster.
6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023 | Melanie: Yeah, our trip got off to a bad start. I was really scared when we got into the accident. Thankfully, my son's ok and that was a reminder that life is precious and to cherish our family.
6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023 | Caroline: Glad your son is okay,
0.response: Caroline's son got into an accident during the road trip but was okay.
